title: calydermos atriplicifolius
intro: Calydermos atriplicifolius, also known as the saltbush, is a type of succulent plant native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Calydermos atriplicifolius include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing with a carrier oil.
